pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 17 APIs and bytecode; keeping 1.8 would result in incompatible class files or missing API support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.7.6 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline; upgrading is required to run on the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add spring-boot-starter-validation dependency to provide validation support in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Validation APIs were moved out of the core starter in Spring Boot 3; this dependency is required to compile code using validation annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from hibernate-validator to let Spring Boot manage it.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 manages Hibernate Validator versions; specifying an old version (8.0.1.Final) causes dependency conflicts or incompatibility with Spring Boot 3's managed version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not support the 'release' flag or Java 17 bytecode generation correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace source/target configuration with release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to compile for a specific Java version in modern Maven plugins, ensuring consistent module path and API usage.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: The javax.validation package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or a compile error if the javax dependency is removed.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: Compilation error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ dependencies.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.why_exists: Class javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest not found; compilation fails because Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE 9+ which moved servlet APIs to the jakarta namespace.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Resource annotation from the javax.annotation package to the jakarta.annotation package to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compilation error due to missing class.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found) or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/contr.general_idea: Migrate the javax.annotation.Resource import to jakarta.annotation.Resource to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/contr.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 / Java 17 environments; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/servi.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.Resource import to jakarta.annotation.Resource to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/servi.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; code fails to compile without this change.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/servi.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation imports to jakarta.annotation to comply with Spring Boot 3 namespace changes.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/servi.why_exists: javax.annotation package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ / Spring Boot 3, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/task/.general_idea: Migrate the javax.annotation.Resource import to jakarta.annotation.Resource to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/task/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 / Java 17 environments; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/utils.general_idea: Migrate the javax.annotation.Resource import to jakarta.annotation.Resource to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/utils.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 applications; using it results in a compile-time error due to missing class.
